response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience and a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (Dec 2014–Jun 2015, ~6 months) plus a C++ bachelor thesis, but lacks the 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows required. No SQL Server/Oracle experience is evidenced (MongoDB and generic SQL only), and there is no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain exposure. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which doesn't substitute for the mandatory C++ depth on Windows in a finance context.
strengths: Strong engineering fundamentals with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practice
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on developer tooling
Excellent communication signals: public talks, workshops, and teaching experience
concerns: Far short of 5–10 years hands-on C++; recent work is TypeScript/Node and DLang
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; databases used are MongoDB and unspecified SQL
Zero capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain background

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain exposure
